name: web3-starter-kit
description: Beginner-friendly Web3 skill suite — safety scoring, smart money signals, guided swaps, and paper trading simulator powered by onchainos

metadata.description: Wraps onchainos CLI into a safety-first Web3 experience for newcomers: safety score every token, track whale signals, discover trending coins, execute swaps step-by-step, and practice with a paper trading simulator

plugins.name: web3-starter-kit
plugins.description: Beginner Web3 toolkit — safety scoring (0–100), smart money / whale / KOL signal tracker, trending token discovery, safe swap guide, and paper trading simulator with decision scoring
